title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at EY India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at EY India
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!
